name: Founder Deep Work — WORK Mode Suppressed Interrupts
description: Founder in WORK mode with high attention load. Non-critical events should not interrupt. Only CRITICAL events bypass suppression. Suppression state machine prevents fatigue.
hypothesis: In WORK mode with attention_load=0.8, non-critical alerts have net_value(INTERRUPT) < 0 and should be QUEUED or DIGESTED.
success_criterion: INTERRUPT rate < 10% for non-critical events when attention_load > 0.7 in WORK mode.
rollback_threshold: INTERRUPT rate on non-critical > 30% in WORK mode triggers attention calibration review.

steps.notes: Low urgency routine update during deep work → DIGEST
Moderate urgency security alert → QUEUE (not INTERRUPT due to attention_load)
Same event type second time → still QUEUE; queue_without_ack_count increments
Third occurrence → suppression_state transitions to ESCALATION_PENDING
Fourth occurrence in ESCALATION_PENDING state → forced INTERRUPT (escalation rule)
CRITICAL event always bypasses suppression regardless of attention_load

audit_trail_assertions: Steps 1-4 have decision != INTERRUPT for non-CRITICAL events
All steps have AttentionCost in audit log
All steps have DecisionRationale with constraints_checked
